strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial founder experience (GISCollective) plus startup roles aligned with intrapreneurial profile
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows at re:cinq
concerns: Title is Senior/Staff Software Engineer — no Principal, Director, or Distinguished IC track record
No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise; AI exposure is recent and tooling-adjacent
No evidence of advising strategic customers/partners or large-scale cloud platform strategy work

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and shipped AI products
Principal/Director-level IC scope and external influence
Breadth of engineering experience and founder background

response.justification: The role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy fluency, and the ability to advise strategic customers — the résumé shows a strong hands-on senior/staff engineer with founder experience and only recent, tooling-level AI work (MCP generators at re:cinq) rather than shipped AI products or platforms. Cloud work is present (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) but at implementation rather than strategy scope, and there is no evidence of the external advisory or thought-leadership footprint expected at Principal level. Strong craftsmanship and entrepreneurial signals partially offset the gap, but the core AI-strategy and seniority competencies are not substantiated.
